outputs.progress: Shipped the first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear, including schemas for open PR counts and issue lists. Implemented registry-backed tool contracts to streamline tool steps. Built the first raw-vs-Runeflow evaluation harness.
outputs.plans: Prioritize tool registry work and add lifecycle hooks for host intervention. Continue developing the hybrid-skills roadmap and refine the evaluation plan for raw skills versus Runeflow.
outputs.problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quota limits are affecting benchmark fairness. Feedback indicates tool contracts should be sourced from a registry to avoid redundancy.
outputs.formatted:
🔧 Runeflow Platform (Mar 29 - Apr 4)
Progress: Shipped the first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear, including schemas for open PR counts and issue lists. Implemented registry-backed tool contracts to streamline tool steps. Built the first raw-vs-Runeflow evaluation harness.
Plans: Prioritize tool registry work and add lifecycle hooks for host intervention. Continue developing the hybrid-skills roadmap and refine the evaluation plan for raw skills versus Runeflow.
Problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quota limits are affecting benchmark fairness. Feedback indicates tool contracts should be sourced from a registry to avoid redundancy.

outputs.progress: Shipped the first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear, implemented registry-backed tool contracts, and built the first raw-vs-Runeflow evaluation harness.
outputs.plans: Prioritize tool registry work, develop lifecycle hooks for host intervention, and refine the hybrid-skills roadmap.
outputs.problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quota limits affect benchmark fairness; considering smaller models or delayed runs for comparisons.
outputs.formatted:
🔧 Runeflow Platform (Mar 29 - Apr 4)
Progress: Shipped the first in-repo tool registry slice for GitHub and Linear, implemented registry-backed tool contracts, and built the first raw-vs-Runeflow evaluation harness.
Plans: Prioritize tool registry work, develop lifecycle hooks for host intervention, and refine the hybrid-skills roadmap.
Problems: Cerebras token-per-minute quota limits affect benchmark fairness; considering smaller models or delayed runs for comparisons.
